baseline_solo.reasoning_summary: ALUR exhibits severe fundamental deterioration (negative PE, negative PB, negative EV/EBITDA, -188.8% net margin), extreme price collapse (-67.4% in 60d), and insufficient corroborating evidence. Macro regime is overheat/restrictive (20% equity cap). No news catalyst in window. Alternative data (Wikipedia pageviews 1-5 views/day) shows no material attention spike. Analyst sentiment is descriptor-only (3 Buy, 1 Hold, 0 Sell as of 2025-03-01) but cannot override fundamental distress. Critical blocks missing: fundamentals (insufficient_evidence), narrative_price_gap_assessment (not_evaluated), ownership data (not_evaluated). Information integrity assessment explicitly forbids use_as_primary_signal. Insufficient evidence to support either buy or short thesis. Fail-closed to no_trade pending upstream narrative and alt-data verification.

suggested_improvements: Obtain complete fundamental snapshot (income statement, balance sheet, cash flow) with PIT-safe accepted dates
Conduct narrative analysis (Agent 02 equivalent) to assess whether recent 8-K filings (7 in 90d) represent genuine catalysts or distress signals
Verify alternative data corroboration: GitHub activity, insider Form 4 transactions, institutional ownership changes (13F)
Evaluate whether negative multiples reflect genuine insolvency risk or accounting anomaly (e.g., loss carryforwards, restructuring charges)
Assess short-squeeze risk: check short interest, float, and borrow availability before considering surge_short sleeve
Clarify macro regime equity allocation: confirm whether 20% cap permits any new equity position at all

baseline_solo.schema_or_prompt_weakness_notes: Baseline solo agent must collapse multi-agent reasoning into single decision without upstream specialist outputs. Critical blocks (fundamental_snapshot, narrative_price_gap_assessment, ownership_positioning) are absent or insufficient, forcing fail-closed stance. Information integrity assessment explicitly forbids primary-signal use, creating a hard constraint that overrides any bullish or bearish thesis. Alternative data is sparse (Wikipedia only; GitHub, SEC 13F, Form 4 unavailable). Macro regime (overheat/restrictive) caps equity allocation at 20%, which may preclude any new position regardless of thesis quality. Without narrative verification and fundamental corroboration, no sleeve (surge_short or quality_long) can be justified.
recommended_followups: Wait for fundamental_snapshot to populate with PIT-safe income statement, balance sheet, and cash flow data
Obtain Agent 02 narrative analysis: is the 8-K activity (7 filings in 90d) a genuine catalyst or distress signal?
Obtain Agent 03 alt-data verification: GitHub commits, insider transactions, institutional ownership changes
Clarify whether negative multiples reflect true insolvency or accounting artifacts (e.g., loss carryforwards, one-time charges)
If short thesis emerges: verify short-squeeze risk (short interest, borrow availability, float)
If long thesis emerges: confirm macro regime permits equity allocation and validate quality_long sleeve thresholds (ROE, debt/equity, margin stability)
baseline_solo.reason: Insufficient evidence to support buy or short. Fundamental snapshot missing (status=insufficient_evidence). Narrative assessment not evaluated. Information integrity forbids primary-signal use. Macro regime overheat/restrictive (20% equity cap). Alternative data sparse and inconclusive. Fail-closed per guardrails.

rule_engine_path: 1. Read envelope: lookahead_safe=true, data_after_cutoff_used=false, immutable_decision_flag=true → proceed
2. Evaluate macro_regime: overheat/moderately_restrictive, stress_score=2, equity_allocation_cap=20%, equity_discipline=strict_quality_and_valuation_caution → constrains position sizing
3. Evaluate fundamental_snapshot: status=insufficient_evidence, all snapshot_quarter fields null → cannot assess profitability, leverage, cash flow → VETO: missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance
4. Evaluate valuation_snapshot: PE=-1.78, PB=-0.66, EV/EBITDA=-1.04, net_margin=-188.8%, current_ratio=0.33 → severe distress signals, but TTM ratios not PIT-safe
5. Evaluate price_snapshot: last_eod_close=2.28, return_5d=-6.6%, return_20d=-36.7%, return_60d=-67.4%, relative_volume=11.6x → extreme deterioration, elevated volatility
6. Evaluate news_event_summary: status=data_unavailable, items_count=0, items_dropped_post_cutoff=20 → no catalyst in window
7. Evaluate alternative_data_features: wikipedia_pageviews 1-5/day (no spike), github_public failed (unmapped_ticker), retail_meme_attention not_evaluated → sparse corroboration

8. Evaluate sentiment_community_ownership_evidence: fmp_sentiment descriptor-only (3 Buy, 1 Hold, 0 Sell), ownership_positioning not_evaluated, sec_13f unavailable, sec_form4 0 rows → no smart-money signal
9. Evaluate information_integrity_assessment: use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false, pollution-defense layer not implemented → VETO: information_integrity_veto
10. Evaluate narrative_price_gap_assessment: status=not_evaluated, agent_LLM_reasoning missing → VETO: insufficient_evidence
11. Evaluate filing_confirmation: SEC_8K_confirmation=true, 7 8-K filings in 90d, but full_text is stub (mock_fallback) → cannot assess catalyst quality
12. Evaluate corporate_calendar: 5 events near decision (all past earnings and 1:25 split), no upcoming earnings → no near-term catalyst

13. Candidate_type evaluation: surge_short requires negative catalyst + alt-data corroboration + short-squeeze risk assessment → missing narrative, alt-data sparse, squeeze risk not evaluated → cannot justify
14. Candidate_type evaluation: quality_long requires positive fundamentals + valuation support + macro alignment → fundamentals missing, valuation distressed, macro restrictive → cannot justify
15. Final decision: insufficient_evidence (3 vetos tripped) + information_integrity_veto + missing_data_persists → decision=no_trade, position_size_pct=0.0
decision_log: T+0: Envelope check — lookahead_safe=true, data_after_cutoff_used=false, immutable_decision_flag=true → proceed to analysis

T+1: Macro regime assessment — overheat/moderately_restrictive, stress_score=2, equity_allocation_cap=20%, equity_discipline=strict_quality_and_valuation_caution → constrains position sizing to max 20% of portfolio

T+2: Fundamental snapshot assessment — status=insufficient_evidence, all snapshot_quarter fields null (revenue, net_income, operating_income, ebitda, eps, margins, cash flow, assets, liabilities, equity, debt all null) → cannot assess profitability, leverage, cash generation → CRITICAL MISSING DATA

T+3: Valuation snapshot assessment — PE=-1.78 (negative earnings), PB=-0.66 (negative book value), EV/EBITDA=-1.04 (negative EBITDA), net_margin=-188.8% (severe loss), current_ratio=0.33 (liquidity stress) → severe distress signals, but TTM ratios not PIT-safe (current_snapshot_not_PIT_safe=true)

T+4: Price snapshot assessment — last_eod_close=2.28, return_5d=-6.6%, return_20d=-36.7%, return_60d=-67.4%, relative_volume=11.6x 20d average → extreme price collapse, elevated volatility, OTC exchange (lower liquidity)

T+5: Corporate calendar assessment — 5 events near decision (all past: 4 earnings, 1 stock split 1:25 on 2025-01-03), no upcoming earnings → no near-term catalyst, split suggests distress restructuring
T+6: News event summary assessment — status=data_unavailable, items_count=0, items_dropped_post_cutoff=20 → no news catalyst in 7-day window (Polygon News returned 0 items)

T+7: Alternative data assessment — wikipedia_pageviews 1-5 views/day (no spike), github_public failed (unmapped_ticker), retail_meme_attention not_evaluated, valuation_context not_evaluated → sparse corroboration, no meme/retail attention signal

T+8: Sentiment and ownership assessment — fmp_sentiment descriptor-only (3 Buy, 1 Hold, 0 Sell as of 2025-03-01), ownership_positioning not_evaluated, sec_13f unavailable (not_available_on_current_plan), sec_form4 0 insider transactions in 90d → no smart-money or insider confidence signal
T+9: Information integrity assessment — use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false, pollution-defense layer not implemented in v1, fail-closed per schema v1.1 decision #8 → VETO: information_integrity_veto

T+10: Narrative price gap assessment — status=not_evaluated, score_band=not_evaluated, agent_LLM_reasoning missing → cannot confirm whether price collapse is justified by fundamentals or represents opportunity → VETO: insufficient_evidence

T+11: Filing confirmation assessment — SEC_8K_confirmation=true, 7 8-K filings in 90d (items 1.01, 2.02, 3.02, 3.03, 5.02, 5.03, 7.01, 8.01, 9.01), but full_text is stub (mock_fallback, extraction_status=stub) → cannot assess catalyst quality or specificity

T+12: Surge_short sleeve evaluation — requires (1) negative catalyst + (2) alt-data corroboration + (3) short-squeeze risk assessment + (4) macro alignment → (1) narrative not evaluated, (2) alt-data sparse, (3) squeeze risk not evaluated, (4) macro restrictive (20% cap) → cannot justify surge_short

T+13: Quality_long sleeve evaluation — requires (1) positive fundamentals + (2) valuation support + (3) macro alignment + (4) quality thresholds (ROE, debt/equity, margin stability) → (1) fundamentals missing, (2) valuation distressed (negative multiples), (3) macro restrictive, (4) net_margin=-188.8%, current_ratio=0.33 → cannot justify quality_long

T+14: Veto summary — 3 vetos tripped: (1) insufficient_evidence (fundamental_snapshot, narrative_price_gap_assessment, ownership_positioning all missing/not_evaluated), (2) information_integrity_veto (use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false), (3) missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance (fundamentals, narrative, alt-data sparse) → decision=no_trade, position_size_pct=0.0
